workflow.topology: Lint and Build & Test start in parallel; XCUITest Flows needs Build & Test.

population.range: Cold-cache-seed main push 29074913754 through the 2026-07-13T06:52:31Z cutoff.

excluded_branch_local_workflow.reason: PR #117's branch-local workflow differs materially from the main workflow blob; it is not comparable.

methodology.wall_seconds: updated_at minus created_at from the workflow-run API.
methodology.job_duration_seconds: job completed_at minus job started_at; dependency-skipped and timestamp-anomalous jobs are null.
methodology.runner_seconds: Sum of non-null job duration_seconds; a usage proxy, not GitHub billing.
methodology.major_step_seconds: GitHub Actions job-step API timestamps at one-second precision for the eight green PR runs.
methodology.log_substep_seconds: Decoded job-log timestamps at microsecond precision for package boundaries, dependency resolution, pre-test setup, and XCTest suite boundaries.
methodology.percentiles: Sort ascending and use linear interpolation equivalent to R/NumPy type 7: h=(n-1)*p, interpolate between floor(h) and ceil(h).
methodology.primary_timing_population: Eight successful pull_request runs under the comparable main workflow.
methodology.reruns: No run_attempt greater than 1 appeared in the queried post-PR-110 pull-request records.

artifact_uploads.basis: The legacy workflow contains no upload-artifact step; decoded logs for the 19-run population contain no artifact upload.

cache_failure_observation.observation: The UI source-only cache was an exact-key hit, but restore failed with gtar exit 2; a subsequent AWS SDK clone reported 'inflate: data stream error'. The separate combined sources-plus-.spm-build archive restored in Build & Test, and that job succeeded.
cache_failure_observation.correction: Do not describe the failed UI archive as the combined or compiled cache.

source_repetition_observation.observation: The same Persistence CachedBook sources compiled in Build & Test at approximately 05:07:52Z and again in XCUITest Flows at approximately 05:36:11Z.

known_gaps: GitHub billing minutes/cost were not available; runner_seconds is the reproducible proxy.

The connected GitHub token could not read admin-only branch protection/ruleset settings. Public REST reported protected=false, enforcement off, required status contexts empty, and rulesets empty at the cutoff; those public responses cannot prove hidden admin configuration.
The in-app browser had no available browser instance, so signed-in repository Settings could not be inspected.
Run 29228928000 has a GitHub timestamp anomaly on its dependency-cancelled UI job; its duration is null.
PR #118 was absent from the workflow-run pull_requests array and was recovered by exact commit-SHA pull-request search.
Cache sizes are the values emitted by actions/cache logs. Decimal GB and binary GiB conversions are supplied; the log's MB label is retained verbatim.
Major-step and per-package measurements are intentionally limited to the eight green PR timing population used for percentile tables.

jobs.name: XCUITest Flows
jobs.data_quality_note: GitHub returned completed_at one second before started_at for this dependency-cancelled job; excluded from runner-duration sums.

runs.pull_request_association_source: commit-SHA pull-request search; the workflow-run pull_requests array was empty
